mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in industrial production signals improving real activity and earnings momentum; rising INDPRO predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered positive INDPRO trend periods deliver 20-day SPX returns no higher than non-trend periods in walk-forward tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 for any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month moving average, tighter short-rate conditions raise discount rates and reduce equity risk appetite, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered tightening instances, or the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating household income and recession risk; UNRATE rising more than 0.3 percentage points in 3 months predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE deterioration is followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or mean triggered returns are not below baseline at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth is equity-positive only when labor conditions are stable; RSAFS rising over 3 months while UNRATE is flat or falling signals durable consumption and predicts positive 60-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform RSAFS-only and UNRATE-only signals by at least 25 basis points per 60-day window, or its walk-forward hit rate is below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in housing starts signals weakening construction demand, credit sensitivity, and future employment pressure; HOUST falling more than 10% below its 12-month average predicts negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls > 10% below its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing weakness is followed by 60-day SPX returns above the unconditional mean in more than half of observations, or downside prediction AUC is below 0.52.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration combined with non-easing policy creates a valuation squeeze; CPIAUCSL rising faster over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is flat or rising predicts negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change rises and FEDFUNDS 3-month change >= 0
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term has no negative coefficient in walk-forward regressions, or triggered 20-day returns exceed baseline returns at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained payroll growth signals immediate income and earnings support; a positive 3-month trend in PAYEMS predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive PAYEMS trend observations produce 5-day SPX returns below the unconditional average in two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows, or Rank IC is below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP contraction confirmed by weakening industrial production signals an earnings recession; GDPC1 negative quarterly growth with INDPRO falling over 3 months predicts negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth crosses below 0 and INDPRO 3-month change < 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint contraction signal is followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of triggered cases, or does not underperform either single proxy signal.
